executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (~75.8h stale, 2026-06-02). Architecture-owned gates are all green.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable primary-repo adoption evidence before whole-stack certification.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks
live_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: Marketing independent verification externally red (~75.8h stale)
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact from 2026-06-02: verdict=fail. Health monitor reports artifact age ~75.8h vs max 4h. Primary-repo/Codeberg adoption still flat (12 stars, 0 delta).
findings.root_cause: Codeberg-primary adoption measurement-pending. Marketing workflow audit confirms bottleneck=distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion, repair_window_status=measurement_pending, primary_repo_flat.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop produces fresh measurable outcome evidence, then reruns marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Loop has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop repeats the same tactics without improving or redesigning.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate or third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate: detect flat outcomes, trigger redesign, register in self_improvement_loops.json with checker/runner/verifier, require independent signoff before marking healthy.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology matches current runtime state
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection: 19 total, 19 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 running, 0 errored. All jobs consecutiveErrors=0.
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology remains coherent while owner-loop work is in flight.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue direct cron inspection as source of truth; never conflate persisted disabled history with live runtime topology.

findings.title: Architecture verifier chain fully green (fresh run)
findings.mechanism: Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Verifier: ok=true, 0 errors. Independent verify: qualified_pass=true (external-only errors). Loop integrity: both loops ok (ralph-docs-watchdog + agent-architecture-watchdog).
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: 17 live loops not registered in self_improvement_loops.json
findings.mechanism: Only 2 loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog) registered. 17 live Gateway cron loops have no self-improvement registry entry.
findings.root_cause: Registry built for the docs/architecture watchdog pair. Remaining live loops never onboarded.
findings.recommended_fix: Onboard all loops with self-improvement mandates or explicitly classify each non-registered loop as monitor-only with documented decision.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only
findings.mechanism: Live Gateway topology exposes 0 disabled jobs. Historical entries in jobs.json are not live runtime blockers.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job removal/disable cleanup.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

findings.title: Loop "internal-linking-watchdog" - removed from live topology
findings.mechanism: Previously flagged for missing self-improvement mandate. No longer present in live Gateway cron topology.
findings.root_cause: Loop removed/renamed since previous audit pass.
findings.recommended_fix: None required. Loop no longer exists in live topology.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add self-improvement mandate to pypi-auto-unblocker or reclassify as monitor-only
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Without a mandate, this loop cannot self-correct flat outcomes.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Closes the last remaining architecture-side self-improvement contract gap.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Onboard all live loops to self_improvement_loops.json or document classification decisions
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 17 of 19 live loops have no registry entry. Incomplete cross-loop self-improvement audit.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Full registry coverage enables cross-loop self-improvement verification.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture-owned gates remain green, the live loop topology/ownership checks are clean, shared market-intelligence reuse is machine-verifiable, and the sole remaining blocker is external (marketing IV stale/fail).
external_errors: marketing independent verification is not pass: 'fail' (2026-06-02, ~75.8h stale)

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed (2026-06-02, ~75.8h stale). Primary-repo adoption flat: Codeberg 12 stars, 0 delta across measurement window.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned chain coherent; does not mean whole stack green.
Live disabled jobs: 0. Persisted history entries not conflated with runtime.
Fresh live topology: 19/19/0/2/0 (total/enabled/disabled/running/errs). All jobs consecutiveErrors=0.
Remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
Stable run: no new repairs required; architecture chain confirmed unchanged from prior pass.
Timestamp ordering stable: independent_verify > verifier > loop_integrity > architecture_latest refresh.
internal-linking-watchdog resolved by removal from live topology.
pypi-auto-unblocker remains sole architecture-side loop without self-improvement mandate.
17 of 19 live loops unregistered in self_improvement_loops.json.
Marketing workflow audit is current but marketing independent verification is ~75.8h stale.
PyPI 1,294 downloads/month is real usage signal that repo metrics (12 Codeberg stars) don't capture.
